---
title: "AMP_banyuls"
format: html
editor: visual
---



## libraries

```{r}
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(rmarkdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(stringr)
library(mapview)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(rfishbase)
library(leaflet)
```


# importation des données
```{r}

pro_data <- read_csv("data/pro/pro_data.csv")

AMP_banyuls<- pro_data %>%
  filter(ID_ZoneDePeche==7)
```

# tailles vs taille capture min 
```{r}





```
